llm_eval.notes: soundness=confirm/excludeが確定セルをTransitionErrorで拒否しreopen経由のみ確定変更を許すsingle-writer rollback防御が中核で堅牢。recompute_aggregatesが真理値表で集約を再導出(宣言値でなくセルから再計算)。set-foundationの確定条件(U1-U3値必須・U4-U9は明示N/A+理由可、かつapproval_log実在approval_ref)、set-decisionのcost_model/evidence https URL(username排除)/RFC3339検証、knowledge candidateのkebab id+lifecycle同一/1段階前進のみ、concrete_intents.serves dangling拒否まで機械検証。responsibility=spec-state.jsonへの唯一の書込経路で、bootstrap/init/apply/chunk/aggregate/set-targets/set-foundation/set-decision/set-knowledge-candidateの全subcommandがspec-state遷移という単一責務に凝集(1035行だが凝集高)。error-handling=TransitionError→1・OSError/JSONDecodeError→1・argparse required subparserでusage→2。side-effect-safety=network:false、_emitが--out|--state|stdoutへ書き宣言write-scope=spec-state.json(単一writer)と整合、load_json_argはJSON文字列/pathを安全判別。frontmatter=PEP723完全。近傍tests/test_spec_transition.pyに64テストあり遷移規則を実確認。
